title: (Bullish Signal) VHI enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Apr 07, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that VHI's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 79 similar cases where VHI's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 64 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%. Current price $22.76 crossed the resistance line at $22.50 and is trading between $23.82 resistance and $22.50 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/05/21 - 04/07/21, the price experienced a +26% Uptrend. During the week of 03/30/21 - 04/07/21, the stock enjoyed a +7% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/djstlswcizr61.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=3992812dc08200a53482f794d9479a007bfa09ba

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 07, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on VHI as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 79 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

VHI moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 02, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 50-day Moving Average for VHI moved above the 200-day moving average on October 15, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +5.42% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where VHI advanced for three days, in 231 of 286 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 173 of 219 cases where VHI Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 79%.
